one_time_description: Cumulative Impacts settlement revenue from Province of BC following Yahey v. British Columbia decision; subsequent events also disclose $16,670,000 + $1,000,000/year and $10,000,000 + royalties for fiscal 2023/2024 from same settlement
economic_notes: Nation has extensive business enterprises including forestry (4 Evergreen Resources LP), renewable energy (Sukunka Wind Project LP), reclamation services (Aski Reclamation LP), industrial supplies (North Wind Supplies LP), fuel card lock (Atooskee Energy Services LP), plant nursery (Twin Sisters Native Plants Nursery LP), and communications (Saulteau Communications LP). Treaty 8 Land Entitlement settlement reached post year-end for 46,953 acres and $123,458,278 in compensation. Cultural centre construction began May 2022, expected cost $26,000,000. Member distribution of $4,995,000 made subsequent to year-end.
notes: Fiscal year ended March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Large number of GBEs accounted for under modified equity method (24 entities). Two entities proportionately consolidated (Nikanese Wah Tzee Stewardship Society 50%, 1225936 B.C. Ltd. 100%). Cumulative Impacts revenue of $2,003,253 recorded in year related to Yahey v. BC settlement. Subsequent events include major settlement: Province to pay $16,670,000 + $1,000,000/year for FY2023/2024, plus $10,000,000 + royalties. Treaty 8 Land Entitlement settlement for 46,953 acres and $123,458,278. Royal Trust holds $10,829,721 in trust for members not included in financial statements. GBE income of $3,245,966 included in revenue. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. OSR calculated as total revenue $29,987,428 minus government transfers (ISC $8,992,610 + CMHC $12,512 + GoC $1,787,500 + FNHA $1,738,401 + BC $3,328,371 + BC Hydro $1,819,637 + BC Gaming $320,020 + NENAS $34,425 + FESC $484442 = $18,517,918) but some items like BC Hydro and FESC may be partially OSR; total_government_transfers estimated conservatively.
